calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joscelyn Torru, Administrator in Propria Persona.

Ms. Torru spoke of family dynamics, and stated that six of the heirs do not want to have the matter continued to address surcharge for fees related to the unlawful detainer and small claims actions. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
